developmental_stages.description: Biological curriculum: sensory → language → comprehension → foundation → mastery

stage_0_sensory.description: Sensory bootstrapping — establish basic neural connectivity

stage_1_language.exit_criteria: Rolling accuracy on language domain > 60% OR all datasets exhausted

stage_2_comprehension.description: Reading comprehension — teach reasoning about text

stage_3_foundation.description: Foundation knowledge — domain knowledge built on language understanding

tier_1_language_adjacent.description: Close to language — literature, history, philosophy, humanities, ethics

stage_4_mastery.description: Self-directed mastery — brain curiosity drives what to study
stage_4_mastery.exit_criteria: 95% mastery per domain OR time cap

notes.curriculum_strategy: Biological developmental stages: Stage 0 (sensory) → Stage 1 (language) → Stage 2 (comprehension) → Stage 3 (foundation, tiered) → Stage 4 (self-directed mastery). See developmental_stages section.
notes.dataset_selection: ALL datasets verified streaming=True with datasets v4.5+ — no legacy scripts, no gated access
notes.coverage: 29 domains: 25 text (language, literature, programming, ethics, philosophy, history, psychology, anthropology, social_sciences, medicine, biology, chemistry, physics, materials_science, electrical_engineering, mechanical_engineering, surface_physics, surface_chemistry, humanities, finance, cryptocurrency, sociology, paleontology, economics, earth_sciences) + 3 multimodal (audio, visual, speech) + 1 live (news)
notes.new_in_v6: Added 5 engineering/science domains: materials_science (4 datasets), electrical_engineering (3), mechanical_engineering (3), surface_physics (3), surface_chemistry (3)
notes.multimodal_note: Audio/visual/speech datasets require sensory cortex Python bindings (audio_cortex_process, visual_cortex_process, speech_cortex_process). Fallback feature extraction used if bindings unavailable.
notes.api_sources: 7 streaming API sources: wikipedia (MediaWiki API), arxiv (arXiv API), stackexchange (SE API), pubmed (NCBI E-utilities), gutenberg (HTTP), conceptnet (REST API), news_rss (22 RSS feeds). All stream over HTTP — zero disk footprint.
notes.live_news: news_rss streams continuously from 22 RSS feeds (Reuters, BBC, NYT, NPR, Al Jazeera, Nature, Ars Technica, HN, Guardian). Polls every 5min, deduplicates by URL, never finishes. Keeps Athena current with world events.
notes.version: v7.0 — biological curriculum (5 developmental stages), batch optimization, curiosity-driven learning + 29 domains
